compliance_status.title: Compliance Status
compliance_status.description: This website is partially compliant with the Web Content Accessibility Guidelines (WCAG) 2.1 level AA. Continuous efforts are being made to improve the accessibility of this digital presence.

measures.title: Accessibility Measures
measures.intro: The following measures have been implemented to ensure accessibility:
measures.item2: ARIA labels (aria-label) for interactive elements like buttons and links.
measures.item3: Semantic HTML5 markup for structural clarity.
measures.item4: High color contrast in accordance with the terminal theme.

non_accessible.title: Non-accessible Content
non_accessible.description: Some historical documents or external project links may not be fully accessible. If any barriers are encountered, please reach out for assistance.

feedback.title: Feedback and Contact Information
feedback.description: Feedback on the accessibility of this website is welcome. Please reach out if accessibility barriers are encountered:

enforcement.title: Enforcement Procedure
enforcement.description: If a lack of accessibility prevents access to a content or functionality of the site, and it is reported without a rapid response, there is an entitlement to send complaints or a request for referral to the relevant regulatory authority (e.g., the Defender of Rights in France for RGAA).
